Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commisioner
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: appearances: elliot beckelman, esq., state of california, department of industrial relations, 415.703.4877, for respondent richard smith; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT RICHARD SMITH's Motion To Dismiss Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commisioner is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
